upasargachandrika.example_text: 'apo mahi vyayati cakzase tamaH' (f॰7.81.1) apAvfRoti apagatAvaraRaM karotItyarTaH ihApaSabdo DAtvarTaM viparItayati
'vAso agne viSvarUpaM saMvyayasva viBAvaso' (vA0 saM0 1140) saMvyayasva=pariDatsva
'tasmE devA amftaM saMvyayantu' (aTarva0 7183) saMvyayantu saMvfRvantu prayacCantu iti sAyaRaH saMvyAnamuttarIyaM cetyamaraH
'tasmE devA amftAs saMvyayantAm' (tE0 saM0 33113) saMvyayantAm vasUni saMhatya dadatvityarTaH
punarutsyUto jaratsaMvyAyaH' (SAM0 brA0 15) jaratsaMvyAyaH purARaM saMvyAnaM prAvaraRam
'A vo hArdi BayamAno vyayeyam' (f0 2296) AvyayeyamAtmAnamAcCAdayeyaM (svasya kzemAya)
'nivItaM manuzyARAm' (praSastamiti SezaH) (tE0 saM0 25111) uBAvapi bAhU nyagBUtO vIyete tasmin
'nivItaM kaRWAvalambitam ityamaraH' karadvaye bahizkfte fjuBAvena gale lambitaM yajYasUtraM nivItamucyate
'aBi vyayasva Kadirasya sAram' (f0 35319) aBivyayasva vassva AcCAdaya pariDehi aBirDAtvarTenEva gatArTa iti supariharaH
'Urgasi iti nABiM pratiparivyayati' (Apa0 SrO0 103914) pratiparivyayati sannahyati
'himasya tvA jarAyuRA SAle parivyayAmasi' (aTarva0 61063) parivyayAmahe parivfRmaH parivItAM kurmaH parivezwayAmaH
'pari tvA dEvI rviSo vyayantAm' (vA0 saM0 66) parivyayantAM parivArayantu
'aTa parivyayati anagnatAyE nvenaM pari vyayati' (Sa0 brA0 37119) ukto'rTaH
'antaraM bahiryogopasaMvyAnayoH' (pA0 1136) upasaMvyAnaM pariDAnIyamucyate saMvyAnaM tUttarIyam yatprAvaraRamucyate bfhatikA ca antarIyopasaMvyAnapariDAnAnyaDoM'Suke ityamaraH
